name: Smart Collections Analytics
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Smart collection analytics enable you to identify low-converting collections and optimize their configuration to improve performance on some of your most viewed pages. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By monitoring traffic, conversion rates, and filter usage across collections, you can make strategic adjustments through merchandising rules and pinning to help ensure customers find relevant products faster."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Collection pages typically receive high traffic volumes, making optimization particularly important for revenue impact. Analytics reveal which filters customers use most frequently and which collections underperform despite strong traffic, enabling you to adjust product ordering, push popular filters to the top, or reconfigure collection settings to enhance the shopping experience and conversion rates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "The Importance of Regular Monitoring"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Constantly monitoring Smart collection analytics can help identify issues and low-converting collections and adjust the ordering or change collection configuration. Collection pages are usually the most viewed pages of a store, so it's crucial to optimize these pages as much as possible."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "\ud83d\udcd8 All analytics data in this guide have been randomly generated for informational purposes."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "\ud83d\udc4d Selecting the most optimal date range "}]}, {"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you're going to check analytics on a weekly basis, it's best to select date range reflecting the previous week's analytics. This is so you can compare analytics on a week-by-week basis for optimal monitoring and comparison purposes."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Top Collections"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report shows top smart collections by traffic with corresponding ecommerce metrics. Merchants can spot poorly performing collections and then apply pinning or merchandising rules to manipulate the ordering or adjust smart collection settings to show different products and therefore improve performance."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/K7MXR5K1EPMJ/eab45f7-top-collections.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/K7MXR5K1EPMJ/eab45f7-top-collections.png", "name": "eab45f7-top-collections.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 203623, "width": 1674, "height": 1528, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FK7MXR5K1EPMJ%2Feab45f7-top-collections.png", "mediaID": 1015, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:46:44+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here it can bee seen that the\u00a0"}, {"text": "stealth-pipes", "italic": true}, {"text": "\u00a0collection is not converting, although it has relatively high traffic. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can check what products are shown and their ordering in the incognito mode of your browser and adjust it with pinning and merchandising rules. You can also adjust the settings of the smart collections to show more products, or fewer products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Top Filters"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here you can see which filters shoppers are using the most within collections. This allows merchants to adjust the setup and configuration of certain collections. Pushing popular filters to the top will make it easier for shoppers to find what they are looking for, thus reducing the time to purchase."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WR3EI6A7GJ2B/9fce23f-top-filters.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WR3EI6A7GJ2B/9fce23f-top-filters.png", "name": "9fce23f-top-filters.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 119556, "width": 1678, "height": 1532, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FWR3EI6A7GJ2B%2F9fce23f-top-filters.png", "mediaID": 1016, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:47:09+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\nIn this case, you can see that the price filter is widely used, so it would make sense to push this filter to the top of the filter list for easier user navigation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
